title: pelexia sancta
intro_study: According to "Indian journal of experimental biology", Pelexia sancta benefits include lowering blood sugar levels in both normal and diabetic rats, as well as potentiating the action of exogenous insulin.
side_effects: Pelexia sancta can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In addition, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to allergic reactions, resulting in hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. If ingested in large quantities, Pelexia sancta can also cause cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and decreased blood pressure. Moreover, improper use can also lead to kidney damage and liver toxicity in some individuals.
